articles.description: The two, jointly carrying a bounty of ₹12 lakh, were wanted in connection with several cases registered at police stations in districts and states, including Chhattisgarh, the Latehar SP said

articles.title: Bengal's farmer-friendly initiative benefited 1.4 crore people: CM Mamata Banerjee
articles.description: Under the scheme, beneficiaries receive ₹10,000 annually, while those with very small landholdings receive a minimum of ₹4,000. The amount is transferred directly to bank accounts in two instalments during the Kharif and Rabi seasons, says West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee

topStories.title: Who is Taylor Brown? Zohran Mamdani appoints New York's first trans woman to lead new LGBTQI+ office
topStories.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani created a new NYC office of LGBTQIA+ Affairs and appointed the “brilliant” Taylor Brown as the director.

topStories.title: US Reports Rise In Mumps Cases: Know Symptoms, Causes, Preventive Measures
topStories.description: The Maryland Department of Health reported 26 cases so far this year as of February 19, including 19 confirmed and seven probable infections. Most of these cases have occurred in adults.

topStories.title: US partial shutdown leaves airport workers unpaid, airports turn to donations
topStories.description: On Friday, March 13, the US airport security officers missed their full paychecks as partial shutdown continues to stretch and approached one-month mark. Since the shutdown began, there has been no breakthrough in the congressional standoff that has now started to disrupt travel across the country.

topStories.description: Kharg Island, critical for Iran's oil exports, holds 30 million barrels of capacity and exports 1.7 million bpd. U.S. strikes raise concerns over infrastructure damage, risking global oil supply.

topStories.description: Airlines for America projects that a record 171 million passengers will travel now through April. They face higher prices and long security lines.

dailyNews.title: Critical swing state candidates reveal where they stand on DHS funding after suspected terror attacks
dailyNews.description: Four suspected terror attacks hit the US during DHS shutdown as Michigan Senate candidates split on funding with Republican Mike Rogers supporting reopening the department.

dailyNews.title: BROADCAST BIAS: Networks hide the ‘M’ word after Muslim terror attack
dailyNews.description: ABC, NBC, CBS avoided identifying Muslim terror suspects in New York bomb plot while labeling another group merely as 'far-right anti-immigrant.'

dailyNews.title: Ex-NFL star predicts streaming giants will team up for bundles as league rights become 'so damn expensive'
dailyNews.description: NFL media rights deal could force streaming services to bundle together as costs expected to soar beyond $10 billion annually, said former Pro Bowler Shawne Merriman.

dailyNews.title: Pennsylvania men accused of ISIS-inspired bomb attack on NYC protesters near mayor's mansion: timeline
dailyNews.description: Two Pennsylvania men accused of ISIS-inspired terror plot threw homemade bombs at NYC protesters. Both explosive devices failed to detonate during the incident.

dailyNews.title: Virginia Dems send sweeping gun ban to Spanberger as West Virginia weighs expanding machine-gun access
dailyNews.description: Virginia Democrats advance sweeping assault weapons ban while West Virginia Republicans propose allowing machine gun ownership, highlighting sharp divide.

dailyNews.title: Iranian drone attacks strain US air defenses as Ukraine pitches low-cost interceptors
dailyNews.description: The rapid spread of low-cost Iranian Shahed drones is forcing the U.S. and its allies to use expensive missile defenses to counter mass attacks.

dailyNews.title: 10 Senate races that could decide control of the chamber in the 2026 midterms
dailyNews.description: Top 10 Senate seats to watch in 2026 midterms include vulnerable Republican holds in Maine, Texas primary battles and key Democratic retirements.

dailyNews.title: Video allegedly shows Michigan synagogue attacker buying $2K in fireworks days before truck rampage
dailyNews.description: Ayman Mohamad Ghazali allegedly purchased $2,250 worth of fireworks before ramming a truck into Temple Israel synagogue in West Bloomfield, Michigan.

dailyNews.title: Amazon's best weekend deals: Up to 80% off Shark, Apple and more
dailyNews.description: Shop this weekend's best Amazon deals on spring cleaning essentials, tech upgrades, kitchen favorites and more — all at limited-time prices.

dailyNews.title: USA beats Canada in World Baseball Classic to maintain American sports dominance over northern neighbor
dailyNews.description: Team USA defeats Canada 5-3 in 2026 World Baseball Classic quarterfinals, marking the third U.S. victory over Canada in major international competition in the past month.

dailyNews.title: Vance touts Trump economy gains during North Carolina tour, cites rising home purchases
dailyNews.description: VP JD Vance claims economy improving in North Carolina campaign visit, touts rising home purchases and falling rents while campaigning for GOP candidates.

dailyNews.title: Team USA baseball manager Mark DeRosa responds to criticism amid mounting controversy
dailyNews.description: Mark DeRosa responded to World Baseball Classic criticism as Team USA advanced to the knockout rounds despite a controversial loss to Italy in pool play.

topStories.description: A Colorado school district was found by U.S. Department of Education to be in violation of Title IX for allegedly allowing male students access to female bathrooms and girls sports.

topStories.title: Vance reveals $19B fraud uncovered in Minneapolis, hints California is next target
topStories.description: JD Vance alleges $19 billion in fraud was discovered in Minneapolis, and the Trump administration may target California for its next major federal investigation.

topStories.title: Trump and Rubio’s Vision of War: The Art of Destroy and Deal
topStories.description: Unleashing his inner hawk, Secretary of State Marco Rubio plans President Trump’s military interventions. So far, they favor regime compliance, not change.

topStories.title: Trump’s War Alliance With Israel Is Reshaping the Middle East. But It Carries Risks.
topStories.description: President Trump is the first American leader to embrace fighting a full-fledged, joint war with Israel. Washington has tried to avoid that level of coordination in the past.

topStories.title: Justice Dept. Legal Threat Complicates Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair
topStories.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

topStories.title: TikTok Investors Set to Pay $10 Billion Fee to Trump Administration
topStories.description: The large fee is the latest example of the White House’s inserting itself into corporate deal making in unusual and aggressive ways.

topStories.title: Kennedy Center’s President, Richard Grenell, Is Leaving After a Tumultuous Year
topStories.description: Since Richard Grenell was appointed by President Trump, the arts center has endured waves of cancellations and departures. It will soon close for lengthy renovations.

topStories.title: Is Latin America Ready to Abandon Cuba?
topStories.description: Latin America’s left saw Cuba as its lodestar. Now leaders across the spectrum are hesitant to aid a nation in the Trump administration’s cross hairs.

topStories.description: The Republican pollster Kristen Soltis Anderson joins E.J. Dionne Jr. and Robert Siegel to discuss Trump’s falling approval rating and what it portends for November.

dailyNews.description: President Trump's comments came shortly after he said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on a vital Iranian oil hub.

dailyNews.title: How would escorting oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz work?
dailyNews.description: With oil markets paralyzed by the U.S.-Iran war, the Trump administration says it could escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz — a massive undertaking that experts say could already be in the preparatory stages.

dailyNews.title: 3/5: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump ousts Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary; Trump picks Sen. Mullin (R-OK) to replace Noem

dailyNews.title: DOJ moves to drop charges against man who burned American flag outside White House
dailyNews.description: Jan Carey was facing two misdemeanor criminal counts in Washington, D.C., federal court.

dailyNews.title: From the archives: Richard Nixon addresses the 1973 energy crisis
dailyNews.description: Then-President Richard Nixon addressed the nation from the Oval Office during the 1973 energy crisis. Fueled by the Yom Kippur War, members of the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries in the Middle East banned the sale of oil to the U.S. and other countries, sharply raising gas prices for Americans as they faced their first fuel shortage since WWII.

dailyNews.title: Democrats seek clarity on Epstein accountant's statements on Trump accuser
dailyNews.description: Richard Kahn, who worked closely with Epstein for more than a decade, testified before the Oversight Committee on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. forces have destroyed the military assets of Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: In a Truth Social post, President Trump said that the U.S. forces "obliterated" Iranian military targets on Kharg Island. The president said the island's oil infrastructure was spared in the attack, but could be struck down the road.

dailyNews.title: Some Republicans warn Trump's SAVE America Act is doomed as Senate tees up a vote
dailyNews.description: Sen. Mike Lee has an online army pressuring Republicans to pass the SAVE America Act, a sweeping election bill, that President Donald Trump declared his top priority.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's Kharg Island but didn't 'wipe out' oil infrastructure
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a Truth Social post that he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid that "obliterated" military targets on Kharg Island.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.
